HelpButton.title: 🧑‍🏫 Host guide
HelpButton.step1Body: On the home page fill in: meetup name, city/district, entry code, date and time, number of courts, then tap “Open”.
HelpButton.step2Body: On the session page there's a QR code and “Copy link” at the top to share with everyone; “Poster mode” can be placed at the door for people to scan.
HelpButton.step3Body: See who's checked in (● arrived). Tap anyone to rename, change level, mark “💰drop-in fee”, or disconnect them.
HelpButton.step4Body: Use “Add manually” on a court card to line players up on court / in the queue; for anyone without a phone, use the “On-site board” to line them up. While a game is in progress (4 players) you can't swap—end it first with “End this game”.
HelpButton.step5Body: When a game finishes, tap “End this game” to bring on the next group; if you tapped by mistake, you can “Undo” within 10 minutes.
HelpButton.step6Body: When a drop-in brings family, a “Pending approval” tag appears; tap them and “Approve” before they can be lined up to play.
HelpButton.step7Body: Tap the title (✏️) at the top of the session page to rename it; the name drop-ins see updates instantly.
HelpButton.step8Body: Tap “Summary” at the top right to see how many games and minutes each person played; “Close meetup” wraps it up.
